items.title: Today’s best iOS app deals and freebies: FROGBLOCK, Welcome To Everdell, Clank!, Dune, more
items.summary:
Alongside the now live official 2026 Memorial Day sales at Amazon and Best Buy, today’s lineup of the best iOS game and app deals is now ready to go. Highlights include FROGBLOCK, Welcome To Everdell, Clank!, Dune: Imperium, Tokaido, Raiders of the North Sea, and more. But we are also tracking one of the best deals of the year on AirPods Pro 3 at Amazon joined by MacBook Neo delivered to you as soon as tomorrow from $590, and this 14-inch 24GB M5 MacBook Pro at $320 off today ($420 off launch price). Head below for the apps.

items.title: Samsung’s 256GB P9 Express microSD card is down to its lowest since price hike at 40% off
items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops Samsung’s 256GB P9 Express microSD card down to $47.99 shipped. This model originally launched at $55 last year before recently climbing as high as $80. Today’s offer marks the first significant discount since that price increase, cutting $32 off its current going rate. We had seen it dip as low as $31.50 before the price hike, but this 40% discount still lands as the best price we’ve tracked since then. Samsung also offers a 512GB version of the P9 Express, though that model is currently sitting at its full $200 list price. Head below for more details.

more…

items.title: Now live: New Nintendo Switch 2 bundle with included game might be the best deal we see all year
items.summary:
While we are still featuring loads of notable deals on Switch and Switch 2 games below, the new Nintendo Switch 2: Choose Your Game Bundle is taking over today’s games roundup. Considering the imminent price hike inbound on Switch 2 consoles, and how unlikely it is going to be to see deals on Nintendo’s latest console this year, we wanted to make sure the Choose Your Game Bundle was front and center.

You’re getting a Switch 2 and one of three games – Mario Kart World, Donkey Kong Bananza, or Pokémon Pokopia – at $499.99 shipped. As of right now that’s $20 or $30 off depending on which game you choose, but once the price goes up on Switch 2 in a few months, this will actually be as much as $80 off. If you’re going to buy a new Switch 2 this year, this limited time bundle might be your best option. 

New Nintendo Switch 2: Choose Your Game console bundle deal now available for purchase

These earbuds have lately been fetching as much as $230, so you can save $100 by cashing in on today’s deal. items.title: Microsoft’s Xbox Ally PC gaming handheld is $100 off for Memorial Day
items.summary:
As part of its ongoing Memorial Day sale, Best Buy is offering Microsoft’s Xbox Ally PC gaming handheld for $499.99 shipped. This is the standard model, the more affordable of the two Xbox Ally variants, which normally carries a $600 price tag. Today’s offer knocks $100 off the regular price, bringing it back down to the lowest price we’ve tracked at Best Buy so far. While Amazon briefly dropped it to $490 once, today’s deal lands within just $10 of that all-time low. Discounts on Microsoft’s newer handhelds have been hard to come by, making this a notable offer for anyone considering picking one up. This might be a good time to jump in while it’s back near its best price, and you can learn more about it below.

items.summary:
Alongside its now live Memorial Day sale and as part of its Deals of the Day lineup, Best Buy is offering ASUS’ ROG Flow Z13 touchscreen gaming laptop for $1,999.99 shipped. That’s a $900 discount on its $2,900 usual going rate. You’re looking at one of the top-end models of this machine with 64GB of RAM, which hasn’t seen many notable offers since its debut. Today’s 31% markdown takes a huge chunk of this notebook’s price tag, making it easier on your wallet. For comparison, ASUS has currently listed one of the base variants of this laptop with 32GB RAM for $2,100, making today’s offer at Best Buy well worth the asking price. Head below for more details.

items.title: Jackery’s Memorial Day Sale offers up to $2,400 power station discounts + 5% and 7% bonus savings – all starting from $129
items.summary:
Jackery has launched its Memorial Day Sale with up to $2,400 power station and accessory savings, as well as two bonus savings codes (5% off and 7% off) for orders over $1,500, and an extra 5% off for military members. This sale – with the bonus savings – marks a solid opportunity to grab Jackery’s 5,040Wh Explorer 5000 Plus Portable Power Station for $2,696.07 shipped, after using the code OFFER7 at checkout, beating out Amazon’s pricing by $184. This is the largest expandable unit from Jackery that would go for $4,299 without discounts, which we’ve mostly seen keeping down between $3,099 and $2,999 in 2026, though there have been more consistent falls lower to $2,899, with rarer chances to grab it at $2,799 and $2,699, too. The deal here gives you a 37% combined markdown with $1,603 savings to the second-lowest price we have tracked behind the $2,659 low that appeared during the March Spring Sale event. Head below to browse the full lineup of deals.

more…

items.title: Add Govee’s Matter-ready Outdoor Lamp Post to front or back yards while down at $260 (Reg. $430)
items.summary:
Through its official Amazon storefront, Govee is currently offering the Matter Outdoor Lamp Post for $259.99 shipped, matching the price direct from the brand’s website. Without any price cuts this smart outdoor lamp post would run you $430, which we’ve seen dropped mostly between $300 and $260 in 2026, though there was a single fall to the $240 low during March’s Big Spring Sale event. Today’s deal is a 40% markdown that cuts $170 off the tag for the second-lowest price we have tracked – just $20 above March’s one-time low. You can also browse all the other Govee smart lighting deals over in the official Amazon storefront here.
